---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Easel
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature request. What would you like to do, and why?

## Motivation

Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution or approach (optional).

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered (optional).

## Use Case Example

Provide a concrete example of how you would use this feature:

```
1. I open Easel
2. I select an element
3. I would like to ...
4. Then I could ...
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that might be helpful.

- Related issues: (link to any related issues)
- Relevant docs: (link to relevant documentation sections)
- Priority: (low / medium / high)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing issues to avoid duplicating this request
- [ ] This feature aligns with Easel's vision of visual web development
